Condition Layout Product Page.description: VTEXIO - Defines a Condition Layout in Product Page
body: "toBe": true, // subject prop must met the predefined conditions to render the new layout
"subject": "", // productId | categoryId | brandId | selectedItemId | productClusters | categoryTree
"Then": "", // Name of the block to be rendered if the conditions are met.
"Else": "" // Name of the block to be rendered if the conditions are not met.
